articles.title: Crypto Exchange Uphold to Keep XRP Listed Until SEC’s Lawsuit Against Ripple Is Resolved
articles.description: Cryptocurrency exchange Uphold has revealed it will maintain the XRP token listed on its platform until the U.S. Securities and Exchange commission’s (SEC) lawsuit against Ripple Labs is resolved. The lawsuit was filed on December 22, one day before former SEC Chairman Jay Clayton resigned, and names Ripple’s two of its executives, who are also significant […]

articles.title: Crypto Exchange Voyager to Suspend Trading of XRP
articles.description: Voyager said it will suspend trading in XRP, effective Monday, Jan. 18, at 12:00 p.m. New York time.

articles.title: Stellar’s XLM up Almost 150% in Last 7 Days
articles.description: Before altcoin season commences, bitcoin and ether may need to see drastic price increases. Bitcoin has already broken the $35,000 handle for the first time, and ether is up over 50% in the last week. Although the number one and two cryptocurrencies have been stealing the show, Stellar’s XLM token has been the biggest gainer … Continued

articles.title: COVID-19 vaccination records stored on VeChain as use cases grow
articles.description: A hospital in Cyprus is now utilizing the VeChain blockchain to store vaccination records.

articles.title: Price of Stellar (XLM) Doubles in Just 24 Hours
articles.description: The US SEC's $1.3 billion lawsuit against Ripple might have given XLM a huge boost, experts surmised.

articles.title: Stellar Price Analysis: XLM Goes Parabolic With 100% Daily Surge, What’s The Next Target?
articles.description: XLM exploded by over 100% today, allowing the coin to reach over $0.4. It has since dropped to trade around $0.3. Against Bitcoin, XLM also surged 97%.

articles.title: Cypriot Hospital Tracks Covid-19 Vaccination Records With VeChain
articles.description: With all the growth in Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other ‘mainstream’ cryptocurrencies, other useful blockchain applications are being overlooked. One of those may be VeChain, a decentralized supply chain management platform. This particular use-case has become more important following the outbreak of the global pandemic in Wuhan, China. The VeChain Foundation confirmed the news via its …...

articles.title: Cyprian Hospital Commences COVID-19 Vaccination with VeChain (VET) Solution
articles.description: Mediterranean Hospital of Cyprus has successfully vaccinated some of its staff against the COVID-19 virus, including 100 doctors and personnel. The process was carried out via the VeChain-powered E-HCert COVID-19 solution, according to a blog post on January 5, 2020. Conquering COVID-19 with VeChain (VET) As the world keep working hard to conquer the COVID-19Read More

articles.title: XLM Prints 73.39% Rise on News of Ukrainian CBDC Collaboration
articles.description: Stellar's XLM has printed a major rise to $0.29, surging by 73.39% over the past 24 hours, while nearly 100 million XLM have been moved with SDF participation

articles.title: Ripple co-founder Jed McCaleb sold $400 million worth of XRP in 2020
articles.description: Ripple co-founder Jed McCaleb appears to have enjoyed a prosperous 2020, having sold more than $400 million worth of XRP over the last 12 months.
